name: Wave 7: manifest contract readiness / workflow_runtime / batch 1
description: Readiness packet that turns the new manifest contract doctrine into explicit workflow launch and retry gates.
outcome_goal: Make workflow readiness truthfully gate launches: stale packet fleets are quarantined, verifier selection is scope-backed, startup wiring truth is surfaced, and degraded catalog/mount state is explicit before relaunch.

token_policy.default_model_routing: explicit lower-cost openai/gpt-5.4-mini for plan/verify/contained packets; openai/gpt-5.4 only for core authority execution
token_policy.strong_model_only_when: authority design or invasive implementation genuinely requires it

anti_requirements: Do not widen beyond listed bug IDs.
Do not mass retry unchanged packets or launch a fleet without one working proof.
Do not resolve FIXED without validates_fix evidence.
Do not use ad hoc SQL for bug status or evidence writes.
Do not create wrapper scripts for behavior that belongs in runtime, registry, event bus, or DB authority.
Do not let readiness surfaces claim success when mounts, verifier selection, or quarantine authority are degraded.

jobs.label: Plan manifest contract readiness packet
jobs.prompt:
Orient from Praxis.db standing orders first. Then use praxis workflow discover/recall as needed to plan this packet.

Bugs in scope:
- BUG-62F78235 [P1/RUNTIME]: Stale workflow packet fleets remain retryable without quarantine authority
- BUG-8F6A612A [P1/VERIFY]: Verifier selection is Python-only instead of catalog-backed by scope
- BUG-123C17AC [P2/TEST]: Startup boot reports success while pytest disables auto wiring and tests assert only booted true
- BUG-9D09F47D [P1/VERIFY]: Route and catalog discovery omit capability-mount degradation and can serve partial API as canonical

Write Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-7-manifest-contract-readiness-1/PLAN.md with: authority model, files to read, files allowed to change, verification path, stop boundary, and per-bug intended outcome. Do not edit code in this job. The plan must explain the manifest contract, the quarantine gate, and how readiness truth will be surfaced before any relaunch.

jobs.label: Execute manifest contract readiness packet
jobs.prompt:
Read Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-7-manifest-contract-readiness-1/PLAN.md first. Implement the smallest durable fix or document a proof-backed DEFERRED/WONT_FIX outcome.

Bugs in scope:
- BUG-62F78235 [P1/RUNTIME]: Stale workflow packet fleets remain retryable without quarantine authority
- BUG-8F6A612A [P1/VERIFY]: Verifier selection is Python-only instead of catalog-backed by scope
- BUG-123C17AC [P2/TEST]: Startup boot reports success while pytest disables auto wiring and tests assert only booted true
- BUG-9D09F47D [P1/VERIFY]: Route and catalog discovery omit capability-mount degradation and can serve partial API as canonical

Rules: use praxis workflow discover before new code; keep writes inside the active Praxis workspace boundary; do not cross Coder/Recruiter boundaries; do not resolve bugs in this job. Write Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-7-manifest-contract-readiness-1/EXECUTION.md with changed files, evidence collected, and intended terminal status per bug.

jobs.label: Verify and resolve manifest contract readiness packet
jobs.prompt:
Read Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-7-manifest-contract-readiness-1/PLAN.md and Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-7-manifest-contract-readiness-1/EXECUTION.md. Run the narrowest meaningful verifier. Use only praxis workflow bugs attach_evidence and praxis workflow bugs resolve for bug state.

Bugs in scope:
- BUG-62F78235 [P1/RUNTIME]: Stale workflow packet fleets remain retryable without quarantine authority
- BUG-8F6A612A [P1/VERIFY]: Verifier selection is Python-only instead of catalog-backed by scope
- BUG-123C17AC [P2/TEST]: Startup boot reports success while pytest disables auto wiring and tests assert only booted true
- BUG-9D09F47D [P1/VERIFY]: Route and catalog discovery omit capability-mount degradation and can serve partial API as canonical

If verification fails, leave the bug open and record the blocker. Write Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-7-manifest-contract-readiness-1/CLOSEOUT.md with proof, commands, status outcome, and unresolved risks.
